Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Sep-05-2017 Advanced From Sep-07-17 To Sep-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 318
MINI MINUTES: Eric C. Schwettmann, Esq. appeared for Argent Hotel via Court Call. There was no appearance or opposition by Annie Wu. Court having read and considered the moving papers grants attorney's fees in the sum of $17,459.50 agaisnt Annie Wu. Mr. Schwettmann is directed to submit a proposed order. Proceedings not reported,
